tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Tehran Toll Booth activated Mar 27 ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed); Brent $112.57/bbl confirmed (CNBC Mar 27 - highest since July 2022); WTI $99.64 (+5.5%) briefly crossed $100 intraday. Tail risk raised to 36%. Trump extended power plant deadline to April 6 - Iran denies any negotiations. Toll booth entrenches Iranian Hormuz control; commercial P&I restoration structurally blocked. PTTEP and Medco remain cleanest ASEAN equity beta. Reduce conviction only on confirmed Pakistan-hosted ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Tehran Toll Booth activated Mar 27 (Al Jazeera, Bloomberg confirmed); Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC), iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp (+6bp). ASEAN Energy Equities est. +6.2% tracking Brent surge; ASEAN Banks -3.1% on spread widening. Energy-over-banks pair trades from stronger footing - toll booth entrenches elevated Brent. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 60.50 (+0.7%, risk-off on toll booth activation Mar 27). Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) and JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.) - Philippines LNG import costs at structurally elevated levels. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed) entrenches Hormuz control; no Ras Laffan restart path. Stress target 61.50-62.50 still active; next inflection is April 6 deadline outcome. Stop only on confirmed ceasefire and Ras Laffan restart.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip

Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) - $42.57/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 6.95% (+5bp), Bank Indonesia constrained. Tehran Toll Booth activated Mar 27 ($2M/vessel in yuan); Trump extends to April 6 - Iran denies talks. Stress target 18,000 on course; next inflection is April 6 deadline outcome. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed with Pakistan-hosted framework.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Mar 28
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp (+6bp, Mar 27); ASEAN HY est. ~535bp (+13bp). Tehran Toll Booth activated Mar 27 ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg confirmed) - P&I insurance restoration structurally impossible while Iranian sovereignty over Hormuz is tolled and legislated. Trump extended April 6 deadline; Iran denies talks. Lebanon front active; Israel ops continuing. 185-200bp is the immediate next stress target - April 6 is the catalyst date. Hold CDS protection; do not reduce ahead of deadline.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Mar 28 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est., -5.7%, Mar 27); TTF ~€55.00/MWh (est., -5.2%, Mar 27). JKM pullback reflects toll booth allowing limited LNG transit at cost for yuan-paying buyers; TTF eased on Trump April 6 extension. Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) - energy supply constraint unresolved. Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked until political settlement. JKM-TTF spread compression is temporary; reinitiate on any toll booth suspension signal. Stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp; ASEAN HY est. ~535bp - unsecured market inaccessible. Tehran Toll Booth activated Mar 27 ($2M/vessel in yuan); P&I insurance blackout continues. Tail scenario probability at 36%. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - April 6 Trump deadline is the next binary event; execute before that date.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB window closes - TH 10Y est. 2.08% (+3bp), USD/THB est. 33.55 (+1.5%, risk-off on toll booth). Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC Mar 27) boosts upstream EBITDA by $42.57/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$20.00/MMBtu (est.) keeps gas import costs elevated. Tehran Toll Booth activated Mar 27 ($2M/vessel in yuan) - Gulf JV toll compliance review now urgent. Execute H2 2026 prefunding and Gulf JV sanctions/toll review before April 6 deadline.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC) and JKM ~$20.00 (est.) structurally elevated; USD/SGD est. 1.2880 (+0.8%, risk-off on toll booth activation). Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan, Al Jazeera/Bloomberg Mar 27) entrenches Ras Laffan shutdown. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp - 185bp stress target is the April 6 event risk. Execute revolving credit expansion before that deadline; pricing deteriorates materially above 185bp.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 13%, stress 51%, tail 36%; Brent $112.57 confirmed (CNBC); ASEAN HY est. ~535bp. JKM ~$20.00 (est.) sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel in yuan, Mar 27 confirmed) entrenches Hormuz control; tail scenario (oil $160+, LNG markets seized) now at 36%. April 6 is next binary event - unsecured market will not reopen before then. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures with urgency.
